---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case, not just the implementation.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work. Include example commands, API calls, or config snippets if helpful.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Scope**
- [ ] Touches the CLI (`resonant_archive/cli.py`)
- [ ] Touches the chunker (`resonant_archive/chunker.py`)
- [ ] Touches the store (`resonant_archive/store.py`)
- [ ] Touches the daemon or MCP server
- [ ] New dependency
- [ ] Documentation only

**Additional context**
Anything else — examples from other tools, links, screenshots, etc.
